content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 APEX TRADE: Entry-Level Crypto Market Specialist Anywhere in the World Aberdeen, City of Cryptocurrency All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5778/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> </p> <div class="vacancy-intro reveal reveal-delay-2 is-visible"> <p>Application link: <a href="https://apexcgroup.com/work/weworkremotely">https://apexcgroup.com/work/weworkremotely</a></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>APEX TRADE is an international company working with digital assets, market research, and data-driven trading solutions. We are building a team of specialists who want to understand how crypto markets operate in practice and develop professional skills in a real market environment.</p> <p>We are opening an&nbsp;<strong>Entry-Level Crypto Market Specialist</strong> position for candidates who are starting their career in the crypto space and are interested in analytics, market behavior, and structured decision-making. No prior professional experience is required — training and guidance are provided.</p> </div> <div class="vacancy-content-grid"> <div class="vacancy-block reveal reveal-delay-3 is-visible"> <h3>Your Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Assist in day-to-day market operations with mentor supervision.</li> <li>Observe and support trading processes on digital asset markets.</li> <li>Monitor price movements, liquidity, and market signals.</li> <li>Collect and organize internal data related to market activity.</li> <li>Prepare short notes, summaries, and structured observations.</li> <li>Participate in team reviews and training sessions.</li> </ul> </div> <div class="vacancy-block reveal reveal-delay-4 is-visible"> <h3>What We Offer</h3> <ul> <li>Remote cooperation format with flexible workflow.</li> <li>Training program for candidates without prior crypto experience.</li> <li>Practical exposure to analytical tools and live market data.</li> <li>Clear instructions, mentor feedback, and structured tasks.</li> <li>Opportunity to grow into a stronger analytical role.</li> <li>International digital-assets environment.</li> </ul> </div> </div> <div class="vacancy-block vacancy-block--wide reveal reveal-delay-5 is-visible"> <h3>We Are Looking For Someone Who</h3> <ul> <li>Has an interest in cryptocurrencies, digital assets, analytics, or financial markets.</li> <li>Is ready to learn and follow structured instructions carefully.</li> <li>Can work accurately with data, notes, and simple reporting tasks.</li> <li>Is organized, responsible, and comfortable working remotely.</li> <li>Speaks English at least at a B2 level for tools, news, and training materials.</li> </ul> <p>Application link: <a href="https://apexcgroup.com/work/weworkremotely">https://apexcgroup.com/work/weworkremotely</a></p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/apex-trade-entry-level-crypto-market-specialist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/apex-trade-entry-level-crypto-market-specialist</a></p> Fri, 10 Jul https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/apex-trade-entry-level-crypto-market-specialist Qase: Technical Customer Support Specialist Anywhere in the World Delaware Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/3015/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Delaware, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://qase.io/">https://qase.io/</a> </p> <p>Hey there!</p> <p>Qase is a modern, all-in-one test-management platform used by QA engineers to ship better software, faster. Customers love us for two things: our clean product and a support experience that consistently scores 95% CSAT and 4.7/5 on G2 (https://www.g2.com/products/qase/reviews). To keep that bar high and be ready for any increase in volumes, we’re adding a Technical Customer Support Specialist to the team.</p> <p>You’ll own frontline conversations, spot patterns, and have the freedom to fix what’s broken without a five-layer approval chain. (For example, one of our reps produced a library of FAQ articles, cutting average chat handle time by 15%.)</p> <hr> <p><em><strong>WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY BE DOING</strong></em></p> <p><strong>HANDLE INBOUND</strong></p> <ul> <li>Resolve about 20-30 chats per day in Intercom; escalate bugs to the Engineering team and capture improvement or feature requests from customers.</li> <li>When required, hop on Zoom/Meet calls (approx. 3–5 a week) when “show-and-tell” beats back-and-forth typing.</li> <li>Keep our enterprise customers smiling with quick, thorough, empathetic responses.</li> </ul> <p><strong>CONTENT &amp; COMMUNITY</strong></p> <ul> <li>Expand our public knowledge base (https://help.qase.io) and occasionally contribute to our blog (https://qase.io/blog)</li> <li>Occasionally, engage on our public roadmap (https://qase.canny.io/), G2, and other communication channels as the friendly face of Qase.</li> </ul> <p><strong>BE AN INTERNAL LIAISON</strong></p> <ul> <li>Distill customer feedback into clear Jira tickets and Canny posts so Product knows what to tackle next; focusing on what matters amid the noise is something we value.</li> <li>Be a product expert and work with Sales to answer questions and assist their efforts.</li> <li>Handle tricky escalations with grace; de-escalate tense conversations before they turn into fire drills :)</li> </ul> <hr> <p><em><strong>QUALIFICATIONS</strong></em></p> <p><strong>MUST-HAVES</strong></p> <ul> <li>2+ years in B2B SaaS customer support (L1/L2).</li> <li>C1-level written and spoken English.</li> <li>Pro at root-cause discovery — separate what users say from what’s actually wrong.</li> <li>Good judgment when the playbook runs out.</li> <li>Curiosity for how things work; you enjoy digging into a customer’s setup.</li> <li>Able to operate autonomously; no one will constantly watch over your shoulder.</li> <li>Quickly learn a new tool/software.</li> <li>Calm, diplomatic communicator, especially when conversations get heated.</li> <li>You value detail and are not sloppy.</li> <li>Hands-on with tools like: Canny, Jira, Notion, Intercom (or equivalents).</li> </ul> <p><strong>NICE-TO-HAVES</strong></p> <ul> <li>Basic comfort with REST APIs, browser dev-tools.</li> <li>Hands-on background in technical troubleshooting is a strong advantage — you’ll regularly dive into unfamiliar tools and customer environments, separate knowns from unknowns, and build a testab
